PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARGS" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+commit'; then echo 'Commit formatting required. Run commit-assistant first.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARGS" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push'; then echo 'Pre-push validation required. Run push-assistant agent first.'; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARGS" | grep -qE 'gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create'; then echo 'Code review required. Run pr-publisher agent first.'; exit 2; fi
